epc.detail: EPC open data needs a free bearer token from get-energy-performance-data.communities.gov.uk (see .env.example / README). Energy findings are unavailable until it is configured.

companiesHouse.detail: Companies House needs a free API key (see .env.example / README). Ownership findings are unavailable until it is configured.

landRegistryCcodOcod.licence: HM Land Registry Free Datasets Licence (CCOD/OCOD)
landRegistryCcodOcod.detail: Land Registry CCOD/OCOD needs a free 'Use land and property data' API key (see .env.example / README). Corporate-ownership findings are unavailable until it is configured.
